name: Superheavy Samurai Drum
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>重</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ツヅ－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>３</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ミ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard: You can target 1 "Superheavy Samurai" monster in your Graveyard, except "Superheavy Samurai Drum"; Special Summon it. You can only use this effect of "Superheavy Samurai Drum" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard: You can target 1 "Superheavy Samurai" monster in your Graveyard, except "Superheavy Samurai Drum"; Special Summon it. You can only use this effect of "Superheavy Samurai Drum" once per turn.
eff: If this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard: You can target 1 "Superheavy Samurai" monster in your Graveyard, except "Superheavy Samurai Drum"; Special Summon it. You can only use this effect of "Superheavy Samurai Drum" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
